highlights: Led migration of a monolithic Rails app to a Next.js + tRPC monorepo, cutting TTFB by 60%.
Architected a multi-tenant SaaS dashboard serving 30k+ monthly active users.
Mentored 3 junior developers through code reviews and pair-programming sessions.
Established CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and automated visual regression tests.
Delivered e-commerce features for a Fortune 500 retail client in a team of 12.
Built a real-time order-tracking module using WebSockets and Redis pub/sub.
Improved Lighthouse performance score from 54 to 91 across the client's storefront.
Contributed to the company's internal React component library.
Designed and implemented REST APIs consumed by iOS and Android clients.
Reduced average API response time by 40% through query optimization and caching.
Set up the initial Docker-based development environment adopted by the full team.
